tests.testProcedure: For a sample of new hires, inspected the Appointment Letter and Non Disclosure Agreement (NDA) acknowledgement to determine whether the users had signed and agreed to preserve ethical values and the confidentiality and integrity of information within Meridian.

tests.testProcedure:
Performed inquiry with Senior HR Operations Specialist to determine whether formalized employee handbook was published on U-Central and accessible by all users.

Additionally, inspected the employee handbook to determine whether it communicated expected workforce conduct, organizational policies, and associated enforcement procedures.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of new hires, inspected the background verification reports to determine whether background check was performed before the date of hire for parameters such as International Criminal Searches, International Global Watchlist, International Education Verification, and International Employment Verification.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the Global Code of Ethics and Business Conduct and Information Security and Compliance training material to determine whether it contained elements of information security policies, security threats overview, email security, password security, and incident management reporting mechanisms during breaches.

Additionally, for a sample of new hires, inspected the training completion records within Mindtickle to determine whether the new hires were made aware of code of conduct and information security and compliance during induction.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the refresher Information Security and Compliance training material to determine whether it contained elements of information security policies, security threats overview, email security, password security, and incident management reporting mechanisms during breaches.

Additionally, for a sample of active users, inspected the training completion records within Mindtickle to determine whether the active users completed the refresher trainings.

tests.testProcedure:
Inquired the Information Security Senior Manager to determine whether the Job Descriptions were updated within Workday and reflect the current job responsibilities.

Additionally, for a sample of Job Descriptions, inspected the job description to determine whether roles and responsibilities were defined.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the Risk Management Procedure to determine whether guidelines for the identification, preparation, and categorization of risks to satisfy business information, legal and regulatory requirements were defined and documented.

Additionally, inspected U-Central to determine whether the Risk Management Procedure was published on U-Central and was reviewed and approved by CISO.

Additionally, inspected U-Central to determine whether the Risk Management Procedure was published on U-Central and was reviewed and approved by CISO.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the Risk Register and corresponding Jira ticket(s) to determine whether the Information Security & Compliance team identified, reviewed, and documented the risks associated with its various functions in context of CIS Critical Security Controls, information security, data integrity, confidentiality, and availability.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of vendors and third party service providers onboarded during the audit period, inspected the onboarding assessment report to determine whether Information Security & Compliance team assessed whether the vendor meets the third-party information security requirements defined by Meridian.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the Management Review Meeting invites, agenda, and minutes to determine whether the Executive Management, Steering Committee (SSC), CISO, Legal team, Privacy team, and the  Information Security & Compliance teams met annually to ensure security initiatives were in line with company objectives and discussed nonconformities and findings identified during information security internal audits / risk assessments / other assessments, incidents, and their respective corrective actions.

tests.testProcedure:
Performed inquiry with Meridian CISO to determine whether Board of Directors constituted of members independent of Meridian daily operations.

Additionally, inspected the ‘List of Directors’ and Board of Directors structure of Meridian to determine whether the Board of Directors demonstrated independence from Meridian's daily operations.

tests.testProcedure: For sample of quarters inspected the Board of Directors Meeting invites, agenda, and minutes to determine whether matters related to Meridian’s results of operations, projections for the coming quarter, and any major changes were discussed between Board of Directors and key members of management.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the Internal Audit Report to determine whether information security and information technology related internal audit was conducted to assess the operating effectiveness of controls related to information security and information technology for Quanta Capture Legacy, User Access Management, Information Security, Data Privacy, Network Security, Endpoint Security, Physical Security, and Human Resource Security.

Additionally, inspected the relevant Jira tickets to determine whether observations were tracked to closure.

Additionally, inspected the relevant Jira tickets to determine whether observations were tracked to closure.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the Software Development Lifecycle Procedure to determine whether guidelines on best practices for training and implementation of software security during application development to maximise their inherent security were defined and documented.

Additionally, inspected U-Central to determine whether the Software Development Lifecycle Procedure was published on Quanta Capture and was reviewed and approved by CISO.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the Global Information Security Policy to determine whether system security, availability, confidentiality, and processing integrity principles; code of business conduct, role competencies, disciplinary policies, human resources security policy, clear desk and clear screen policy, media handling guidelines, access control policies, and physical security policies were defined and documented.

Additionally, inspected U-Central to determine whether the Global Information Security Policy was published on U-Central and was reviewed and approved annually by CISO.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the asset inventory within Freshdesk to determine whether Corporate IT Team maintains a list of workstations, servers and network devices identifying the asset ID, asset owner, asset location, asset type and model of the asset.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the configuration within Workday HRMS and Azure Active Directory to determine whether an account within the local Azure Active Directory is automatically created when a user ID is created within Workday HRMS tool.

Additionally, for a sample of new joiners, inspected the automated Workday emails and access creation logs within Azure Active Directory to determine whether the local Azure Active Directory accounts were created.
tests.procedure:
Inspected the configuration within Workday HRMS and Azure Active Directory to determine whether an account within the local Azure Active Directory is automatically created when a user ID is created within Workday HRMS tool.

Additionally, for a sample of new joiners, inspected the automated Workday emails and access creation logs within Azure Active Directory to determine whether the local Azure Active Directory accounts were created.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the configuration within Workday HRMS and Azure Active Directory to determine whether an account within the local Azure Active Directory is automatically deactivated when a user ID is deactivated within Workday HRMS tool.

Additionally, for a sample of leavers, inspected the access revocation logs within Azure Active Directory to determine whether the user's access was revoked on or before their last working date.
tests.procedure:
Inspected the configuration within Workday HRMS and Azure Active Directory to determine whether an account within the local Azure Active Directory is automatically deactivated when a user ID is deactivated within Workday HRMS tool.

Additionally, for a sample of leavers, inspected the access revocation logs within Azure Active Directory to determine whether the user's access was revoked on or before their last working date.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the group policy settings configured on Meridian Azure Active Directory to determine whether password settings included configurations to enforce password length as 12 characters, password complexity, password history as 24 passwords remembered, and password expiry as 90 days, account lockout after 5 invalid logon attempts, and account lockout is reset after 30 minutes through group policy settings.
tests.procedure: Inspected the group policy settings configured on Meridian Azure Active Directory to determine whether password settings included configurations to enforce password length as 12 characters, password complexity, password history as 24 passwords remembered, and password expiry as 90 days, account lockout after 5 invalid logon attempts, and account lockout is reset after 30 minutes through group policy settings.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the group policy settings configured on Meridian Azure Active Directory to determine whether unattended end user workstations were terminated within 10 [India] / 30 [US] minutes of inactivity with password protected screensaver.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the hardening documents to determine whether policies and procedures for applying minimum baseline security standards were documented and approved by Meridian Management.

Additionally, inspected the hardening parameters for a sample of network devices, servers, and workstations to determine whether hardening parameters were as per defined hardening standards.
tests.procedure:
Inspected the hardening documents to determine whether policies and procedures for applying minimum baseline security standards were documented and approved by Meridian Management.

Additionally, inspected the hardening parameters for a sample of network devices, servers, and workstations to determine whether hardening parameters were as per defined hardening standards.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configuration settings within M365 to determine whether anti-spam filter was configured to restrict malicious incoming emails and compensating Data Loss Prevention (DLP) to prevent sharing of information over email.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the Certificate of Destruction to determine whether documentation, workstations, and media devices were sanitized prior to disposal or decommissioning in accordance with the Asset Management Procedure.
tests.procedure: Inspected the Certificate of Destruction to determine whether documentation, workstations, and media devices were sanitized prior to disposal or decommissioning in accordance with the Asset Management Procedure.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the management approved network diagrams of Bengaluru, Chennai, London, Palo Alto, New York, and Valencia to determine whether firewall was implemented on the delivery center's internet gateway.

Additionally, inspected the configurations within the firewalls to determine whether rules were configured and enforced to:
► ‘deny all’ traffic by default with access enabled for specific services as per business requirements,
► protect against Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) and IP spoofing attacks, and
► configure Intrusion Prevention System (IPS) and web filters to monitor and prevent intrusion attempts.
tests.procedure:
Inspected the management approved network diagrams of Bengaluru, Chennai, London, Palo Alto, New York, and Valencia to determine whether firewall was implemented on the delivery center's internet gateway.

Additionally, inspected the configurations within the firewalls to determine whether rules were configured and enforced to:
► ‘deny all’ traffic by default with access enabled for specific services as per business requirements,
► protect against Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) and IP spoofing attacks, and
► configure Intrusion Prevention System (IPS) and web filters to monitor and prevent intrusion attempts.

For a sample of commits on the GitHub master branch for Zephyr Platform, inspected the inspected the GitHub workflow to determine whether the pipelines contained work-steps configured for Unit and Integration Testing, and whether the work-steps were completed successfully.

For a sample of commits on the GitHub master branch for Zephyr Platform, inspected the GitHub pipelines to determine whether the SonarQube work step for code coverage checks was completed successfully.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the GitHub workflow files to determine whether the workflows are designed to ensure that the helm charts are updated with the latest production-ready image. Additionally, inspected the GitHub workflow files to determine whether the Flux service was configured for deployment to Kubernetes clusters within the production environment.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the annual source-code review report for Zephyr Platform and Quanta Portfolio products to determine whether security vulnerabilities for the repositories were identified and documented.

Further, inspected the JIRA tickets for high and critical issues to determine whether the Engineering and Infrastructure Operations teams implement corrective actions within the defined SLAs. 

Additionally, inspected the email communication to determine whether A follow-up remediation review is performed by the vendor to ensure issues are resolved, reinforcing Meridian's commitment to secure coding practices and data protection.
tests.procedure:
Inspected the annual source-code review report for Zephyr Platform and Quanta Portfolio products to determine whether security vulnerabilities for the repositories were identified and documented.

Further, inspected the JIRA tickets for high and critical issues to determine whether the Engineering and Infrastructure Operations teams implement corrective actions within the defined SLAs. 

Additionally, inspected the email communication to determine whether A follow-up remediation review is performed by the vendor to ensure issues are resolved, reinforcing Meridian's commitment to secure coding practices and data protection.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the annual vulnerability assessment and penetration test reports for Quanta Capture Legacy product to determine whether application level, network level, and API vulnerability and penetration tests for Quanta Capture were conducted, and corrective and preventive actions were tracked to closure for identified vulnerabilities.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the group policy configuration on Microsoft MDM to determine whether removable media devices such as Compact Disk (CD) readers-writers and Universal Serial Bus (USB) are disabled on end-user workstations.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the CrowdStrike Falcon EDR software configurations to determine whether the EDR software is configured to perform real-time scans to protect against malware and intrusion attempts; and whether agent tamper protection was enabled.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the configuration settings within ProACT to determine whether alerts generated by CrowdStrike, Microsoft MDM, and firewalls were configured to be re-directed to ProACT.

Additionally for a sample of Freshdesk tickets related to logging and monitoring of CrowdStrike, Microsoft MDM, and firewalls, inspected the ticket to determine whether the Security Operations team analyzed and took necessary corrective actions prior to closing the ticket.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of security incidents / breaches, inspected the Freshdesk ticket to determine whether the Security Operations team performed analysis of the incident / breach and documented the details of analysis, security violation, root cause, user / group responsible, severity of the incident / breach, and prevention and mitigation steps within the Freshdesk ticket before closing the ticket.

tests.testProcedure:

tests.testProcedure:

Additionally, for a sample of resigned / terminated / absconding users, inspected the access control system to determine whether the physical access for resigned / terminated / absconding user was deactivated within one day of the intimation.
